title: Tool boundaries — tool catalog + per-agent permission matrix
description: Validates the policy file that enumerates which tools exist and which agents may invoke each. The orchestrator binds tool-call surfaces per agent based on this. Schema-level constraints encode Rules 1 and 2 (no data access before A4; only A3 contacts the user).

tools.description: The tool catalog. Every tool an agent may invoke must appear here.

agent_permissions.description: Per-agent permission record. Keys are A1..A6.

invariants.description: Structural invariants that auditing must respect. Schema-encoded for verifiability.

agents_permitted_data_apis.description: Rule 1: ONLY A4 may invoke any tool of kind=data_api.

agents_permitted_user_surface.description: Rule 2: ONLY A3 may invoke any tool of kind=user_surface.

agents_permitted_file_write.description: Only A6 may invoke any tool of kind=file_write.

kind.description: Tool category. Drives the structural invariants.

credential_scope.description: When requires_credential=true, the OAuth scope or equivalent. e.g. 'https://www.googleapis.com/auth/analytics.readonly'.

constraints.description: Tool-specific runtime constraints. Free-form by design; orchestrator enforces what it understands.

may_use.description: Allow-list of tool_ids this agent may invoke. Empty array = agent has no tools (e.g. A1).

may_not_use.description: Optional explicit-deny list for clarity. Anything not in may_use is implicitly denied; this list documents the specifically-forbidden cases.

can_contact_user.description: True only for A3. The orchestrator structural invariant agents_permitted_user_surface=[A3] enforces this.

can_generate_user_facing_text.description: What level of user-facing text generation is permitted. 'no' = none. 'only_via_templates' = templated chip/label text (A6). 'only_via_catalog_hints' = hint text from catalog only (A3 clarification options).

rationale.description: Why this permission set; cross-references Phase 1 agent spec.

per_tool_constraints.description: Optional overrides of tool-level constraints for this specific agent.
